description: Single source of truth for agent metadata. Used by coder-orchestrator to validate references and by hooks for agent-discovery logic.

workflow-planner.description: Decompose requests into Atomic Committable Units with dependency ordering

architecture-auditor.description: Read-only architecture and layer violation audit

code-implementer.description: Scoped implementation after plan approval with Impact Radius Protocol

code-reviewer.description: Security audits, edge-case detection, and adversarial code review

debugging-engineer.description: Systematic root-cause analysis and error tracing

test-engineer.description: Test generation, coverage gap detection, TDD scaffolding

refactoring-engineer.description: Structural transformations toward Modular MVC + Service + Repository

devops-engineer.description: Docker, CI/CD, Traefik, GHCR, VPS deploy configurations

docs-engineer.description: README, API specs, inline docs, PR descriptions

ui-engineer.description: Frontend UI components, state management, CSS/Tailwind, accessibility

db-architect.description: Database schemas, migrations, query optimization, indexing

quality-guardian.description: Quality gate and consistency enforcement — code smell, best practices, naming, structure, style uniformity

todo-checker.description: Scan for leftover TODOs, FIXME comments, dummy/mock code

diagram-engineer.description: Generate visual Mermaid diagrams from codebase graph

rollback-engineer.description: Auto-bisect to find failing commits and propose reverts/fixes

memory-librarian.description: Read, search, and write to long-term agentic memory bank

multi-repo-orchestrator.description: Cross-repository API contracts and multi-workspace synchronization

codebase-qa-agent.description: Answer codebase questions by searching docs, code, and CodeGraph

secret-scanner.description: Scan for hardcoded secrets, API keys, tokens, and passwords

vulnerability-scanner.description: Scan dependencies for known CVEs and generate SBOM

docs-generator.description: Generate CONTRIBUTING.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, ADRs, PRs, changelogs
